steps.title: Convert quarters to years
steps.content:
The original model uses $t$ in years. Since $4$ quarter years make $1$ year, $q$ quarter years equals
$$
t=\frac{q}{4}
$$

steps.title: Substitute into the model
steps.content: Replace $t$ with $\frac{q}{4}$ in the original equation. $$ M=2{,}200(1.03)^t $$ $$ M=2{,}200(1.03)^{\frac{q}{4}} $$ The answer is A.
